raw_consumer_statement: Order from XXXX  XXXX for XXXX x XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( Order Conf. # : XXXX ) placed on XX/XX/year>. Both cameras rcvd and defective. One does not keep current date and the other powers off while plugged into constant power. I attempted to contact vendor by email on XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year> with video and pictures of product issues. No response. Filed dispute with Citi XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ) XXXX on XX/XX/year>. Yesterday ( over a month and a half ) Citi closed the dispute without any evidence from me and in favor of the vendor. They originally told me that they would request my info, they never did and there was no way to upload any info neither by online portal or app.
